Name: OS_REINFORCE_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the configuration for each OS Tuning install or upgrade.

Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Disable Param - Product
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the Product version package.

Fields.Name: OS Install: Number of Unlocks
Fields.Description: Number of unlocks that this OS tuning option has. 1 is Install, 2 and above are upgrades.

Fields.Name: OS Install: Image ID
Fields.Description: Refers to the icon ID from SB_OsIcon.layout

Fields.Name: OS Install 1: Value
Fields.Description: The effectiveness string to display for the OS upgrade text in UI.

Fields.Name: OS Install 1: Cost
Fields.Description: The cost in OS chips for the upgrade.

Fields.Name: OS Install 1: Description
Fields.Description: The description text that displays the effect. The effect value is placed within this FMG text.

Fields.Name: OS Install 2: Value
Fields.Description: The effectiveness string to display for the OS upgrade text in UI.

Fields.Name: OS Install 2: Cost
Fields.Description: The cost in OS chips for the upgrade.

Fields.Name: OS Install 2: Description
Fields.Description: The description text that displays the effect. The effect value is placed within this FMG text.
